configurePresets.name: windows-clang
configurePresets.description: Builds the game-linked mods with clang-cl. Plain MSVC (cl) mishandles the mod SDK's modmeta section and the game refuses the hooks ('undeclared target'). Also pass -DDUSK_GAME_EXE=<path to sdk/windows-amd64.lib> extracted from the platform-v2-test win32-msvc-x86_64 game zip (or the standalone windows-amd64.lib release asset).
